note_main_file: id=61 'Improved Blood Strike' (spec_tree=-1) — CORRECTED: flags [4,0,0]→[4194304,0,0]. Old flags=bit2(4) targeted Chains of Ice mask0 bit2, not Blood Strike(45902) which is mask0 bit22(0x00400000=4194304). CRITICAL BUG. verified=true.
id=62 'Virulence' (spec_tree=-1) — all-ones, carrier=Icy Touch(45477) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. No flag change. verified=true.
_notes.note_blood_spellmod_scope: Blood tree is melee/proc-heavy. Butchery (tier 1) is Runic Power generation — not SpellMod. Most Blood talents (Blade Barrier, Scent of Blood, Dark Conviction, Death Rune Mastery, Mark of Blood, Spell Deflection, Will of the Necropolis, Blood-Caked Blade, Blood Gorged) are passive/proc/conditional.

talent_affixes._todo: Butchery (2r, tier 1) — You generate 1/2 Runic Power per 5 seconds while in combat and 10/20 Runic Power when killing an enemy that yields XP or honor. Passive RP generation, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Icy Touch
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[66,0,0]=0x00000042. IcyTouch(45477) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. mask0 bit1(2)+bit6(64)=66. Icy Touch damage +5%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Blood Strike
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4194304,0,0]=mask0 bit22 (0x00400000). BloodStrike(45902) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. Blood Strike damage +5%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Subversion
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[20971520,131072,0]. mask0: BloodStrike(45902) bit22(4194304)|HeartStrike(55050) bit24(16777216)=20971520 (0x01400000). mask1: Obliterate(49020) bit17(131072). No shared bits across all three spells. Carrier BloodStrike(45902) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. Blood Strike, Heart Strike, and Obliterate crit chance +3%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 300). WotLK: 3r at +3/+6/+9%.

talent_affixes._todo: Blade Barrier (5r, tier 1) — Reduces damage taken by 1/2/3/4/5% when all Blood Runes are on cooldown. Passive proc-based mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Bladed Armor (5r, tier 2) — Increases spell power by 2/4/6/8/10% of armor value. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Scent of Blood (3r, tier 2) — After dodging, parrying, or taking damage, 15/30/45% chance to grant a charge making next ability cost no runes. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Two-Handed Weapon Specialization (3r, tier 2) — Increases damage with two-handed melee weapons by 2/4/6%. Passive melee stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Dark Conviction (5r, tier 3) — Increases crit chance by 1/2/3/4/5%. Affects melee AND spells — melee portion not implementable as SpellMod. All-ones would be partial scope. Deferred.
Death Rune Mastery (3r, tier 3) — Obliterate and Death Strike convert used runes to Death Runes. Rune conversion mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Death Strike (3r, tier 3) — Increases Death Strike damage and healing by 15/25/40%. Non-linear progression — not modelable with linear value_per_rank.
Rune Tap (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Mark of Blood (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Vendetta (2r, tier 4) — Killing an enemy restores 2/4% total health. Kill proc, not implementable as SpellMod.
Bloody Strikes (3r, tier 5) — Blood Strike +5/10/15%, Pestilence +10/20/30%, Heart Strike +10/20/30%. Different percentage increments per spell — not modelable as a single linear SpellMod entry.
Spell Deflection (3r, tier 5) — Chance equal to parry to reduce spell damage taken by 15/30/45%. Conditional passive mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Veteran of the Third War (3r, tier 5) — Increases Strength, Stamina, expertise, and defense. Passive stats, not implementable as SpellMod.
Hysteria (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Rune Tap
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[134217728,0,0]=mask0 bit27 (0x08000000). RuneTap(48982) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. Carrier RuneTap(48982) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. Rune Tap healing +25%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 25). WotLK: 2r at +25/+50% (base 10% max health → 12.5%/15%).

talent_affixes._todo: Abomination's Might (2r, tier 6) — Melee attacks have 25/50% chance to increase party Attack Power by 10% for 10 sec. Proc/aura buff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Vampiric Blood (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Will of the Necropolis (3r, tier 7) — Reduces damage taken by 5/10/15% when below 35% health. Conditional passive mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Blood-Caked Blade (3r, tier 7) — Auto attacks have 25/50/75% chance to trigger Blood-Caked Strike dealing 5/10/15% weapon damage. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Blood Gorged (5r, tier 8) — When above 75% health, attacks ignore 3/6/9/12/15% of armor. Passive conditional stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Dancing Rune Weapon (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
